signoff_lane.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_durable_rch_final_signoff CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test durable_rch_proof_final_signoff_contract -- --nocapture

required_child_rows.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_durable_rch_proof_receipt_contract CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test durable_rch_proof_receipt_contract -- --nocapture
required_child_rows.claim_boundary: Receipt schema fields, fail-closed fixtures, redaction, and non-claim boundaries only.

required_child_rows.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_durable_rch_proof_submission_contract CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test durable_rch_proof_submission_contract -- --nocapture
required_child_rows.claim_boundary: Submission lifecycle, source expectation capture, duplicate policy, and fail-closed local-fallback refusal only.

required_child_rows.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_durable_rch_proof_receipt_capture CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test durable_rch_proof_receipt_capture_contract -- --nocapture
required_child_rows.claim_boundary: Terminal receipt capture, bounded first-blocker output, stale/cancel/infra/local-fallback classification, and redaction only.

required_child_rows.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_durable_rch_cli_contract CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test durable_rch_proof_submission_contract -- --nocapture
required_child_rows.claim_boundary: Submit/status/query/cancel UX and machine-readable refusal output only.

required_child_rows.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_durable_rch_manifest_status CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract --test proof_status_snapshot_contract -- --nocapture
required_child_rows.claim_boundary: Manifest/status durable receipt candidate policy, exact-lane matching, and broad-claim refusal only.

required_child_rows.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_durable_rch_mail_templates CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test durable_rch_proof_mail_templates_contract -- --nocapture
required_child_rows.claim_boundary: Offline Agent Mail templates, targeted handoff wording, and no-broadcast/no-green-partial boundaries only.

required_child_rows.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_durable_rch_e2e CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test durable_rch_proof_e2e_contract -- --nocapture
required_child_rows.claim_boundary: Deterministic fixture replay for durable proof scenarios only; no live fleet or release-readiness claim.

operator_recipes.command: python3 scripts/durable_rch_proof_submission.py submit --repo-root /data/projects/asupersync --lane-id durable-rch-proof-final-signoff --agent MistyMill --branch main --head-commit <HEAD> --expected-head <HEAD> --source-tree-fingerprint <TREE> --output json
operator_recipes.purpose: persist a detached proof submission before the RCH process is observed

operator_recipes.command: record durable_submission_id and leave the RCH worker running; do not cancel another agent's lane without explicit handoff
operator_recipes.purpose: make disconnection safe without converting running work into proof
read the durable submission or terminal receipt by id

operator_recipes.command: cite only lifecycle_state=terminal_pass, terminal_classification=pass, proof_evidence_status=fresh-rch-pass, exact manifest lane, exact source HEAD, exact command fingerprint, and no local fallback markers
operator_recipes.purpose: turn a terminal pass receipt into narrow evidence

operator_recipes.command: copy refusal_reason_codes, first_blocker_lines, and explicit_not_covered; do not describe blocked, stale, partial, canceled, local-fallback, or unsupported receipts as green proof
operator_recipes.purpose: fail closed while preserving actionable evidence
record explicit cancellation evidence without confusing it with a proof failure

operator_recipes.command: send the handoff-to-next-agent template with durable_submission_id, manifest_lane_id, source_head, command_fingerprint, receipt marker, first blocker, refusal reasons, and query command
operator_recipes.purpose: move ownership without broadcast spam or hidden state

workflow_invariants: all commits land directly on main
after pushing main, mirror legacy master with git push origin main:master
do not create branches, worktrees, or scratch clones
do not delete files or run destructive cleanup
new artifacts under artifacts/ are ignored and require git add -f
tests are deterministic and do not require live RCH, live Agent Mail, tracker mutation, or network access

allow_parent_close_when: every required child row has current_evidence_status=fresh-rch-pass
every proof command starts with the remote-required RCH prefix
the final signoff contract has a focused remote-required RCH pass recorded in the bead closeout
partial, stale, canceled, client-disconnected, local-fallback, and unsupported broad-claim receipts are all refused as green proof
operator recipes cover submit, detach, query, cite, refuse, cancel, and handoff
main to legacy master sync expectations remain documented
block_parent_close_when: any child row is stale, blocked, unsupported, no-win, approved-cache-hit, or rerun-required

any receipt with partial, stale, canceled, client-disconnected, local-fallback, dirty-overlap, stale-head, wrong-feature-set, wrong-command-envelope, or unsupported broad-claim status is accepted as green proof
any recipe requires live Agent Mail, live RCH, tracker mutation, network access, branch creation, worktree creation, scratch clones, file deletion, or local Cargo fallback

validation_frontier_notes.claim_boundary: This broad clippy blocker is not part of the durable RCH final signoff contract evidence.

current_operator_report.summary: All durable RCH child rows have focused remote proof recorded. The final signoff remains scoped to the durable proof-submission program and still needs the final signoff contract RCH pass in the bead closeout before closing the parent.

non_claims: does not prove live RCH fleet availability
does not prove broad workspace health
does not prove correctness of unrelated proof lanes
does not prove broad clippy or full test release gates
does not allow local Cargo fallback as proof
